name: Misha  Flott
description:
__Race:__ Human
__Height:__ 150 cm (4'9")
__Affiliation:__ Guild

Misha Flott is a Guild worker and friend of Eina Tulle. Misha is a curious and slightly irresponsible girl. She likes teasing her friend, Eina, about her relationship with Bell; or any of her male relationships for that matter. Though she likes complaining, she still does her job; although whether it was done correctly or not is up for debate. 

(Source: Danmachi Wiki)
